---
title: "Resume"
format: pdf
---

# Antonio Vera Gonzalez

+1 (208) 760-5871\
ver21021\@byui.edu\
https://www.linkedin.com/in/antonioverag1212/

## Relevant Experience

### Credit Analyst (Small Business Oriented)

**Edpyme Credivision S.A., Lima, Peru**\
*January 2021 – July 2021*

- Built strong relationships with over 35 new clients through constant interaction while developing my own portfolio.
- Built a loan portfolio of over S/. 300,000 during the COVID-19 pandemic.
- Analyzed more than 50 loan requests as a member of the Loan Approval Committee.

### Student Instructor (GE 101)

**Brigham Young University–Idaho, Rexburg, ID**\
*August 2022 – November 2022*

- Taught classes averaging 25 first-year college students.
- Planned approximately 13 lessons per semester in teams of two or three instructors.
- Instructed more than 200 students over five semesters while maintaining effective classroom management.

### Full-Time Representative

**The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, Mexico City, Mexico**\
*June 2018 – May 2020*

- Led groups of eight representatives in leadership training.
- Managed challenging situations through teamwork, communication, and goal setting.

### Economic Consulting Project

**Fizz Rizz, Rexburg, ID**\
*February 2026 – April 2026*

- Conducted an economic analysis of sales, pricing, and customer behavior.
- Used linear regression in R to identify weekly and seasonal sales patterns.
- Designed a Power BI presentation to communicate findings and pricing recommendations.

## Education

### Brigham Young University–Idaho

**Bachelor of Science in Economics**\
*January 2022 – Present*

- Minor in Data Science
- Expected graduation: Fall 2026

### Fundet Credit Analyst Intensive Program

**Credit Analyst Certification**\
*January 2021 – July 2021*

- Completed intensive training for the microfinance sector.

### Universidad Nacional Mayor de San Marcos

**Economics**\
*January 2017 – December 2017*

- Completed coursework in mathematics, politics, and economics.
- Admitted before finishing high school through a competitive entrance exam.

## Skills

- SQL
- Python
- R
- Power BI
- Microsoft Office
- Econometrics
- Statistics
- AI Tools

## Additional Information

- Native Spanish speaker; fluent in English
- Leadership Training at BYU–Idaho \<!-- \### Footer

Last updated: Jul 2026 --\>
